title: cytisus supinus var. absinthioides
intro: Cytisus supinus var. absinthioides, also known as the 'Scotch Broom', is a shrub-like plant species within the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, due to its anthelmintic and purgative effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve constipation, and act as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its herbal remedies, though it is essential to note that excessive consumption can be toxic.
